name: Campsite
description: Campsite — Internal communications tool combining async posts, threads, and doc sharing for product teams.

seo.title: Campsite — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Campsite: Campsite — Internal communications tool combining async posts, threads, and doc sharing for product teams.

when_to_use: Async product update posts for distributed engineering teams
Centralizing design feedback with inline comments on images
Replacing standup meetings with async thread updates
Onboarding documentation shared as structured posts

pros: Clean thread and doc sharing UX
Built by ex-GitHub team, polished product
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Slack or Notion
Discovery of old posts still rough
Future uncertain after Notion acquisition talks
review.verdict: A beautifully designed async comms tool, but long-term independence is the real question mark.
review.best_for: Product teams tired of Slack noise who want structured async updates and threads.
review.not_for: Customer support workflows or teams needing real-time chat as the primary channel.
